proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[T, U](h)
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T) { h(k0) = h(w0) and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: T satisfy { h(w1) = h(w0) and w1 != w0 }
let w2: T satisfy { h(w2) = h(w0) and w2 != w0 }
function(x0: T, x1: T) { h(x0) != h(x1) or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T) { h(k0) = h(w0) and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: T satisfy { h(w1) = h(w0) and w1 != w0 }
let w2: T satisfy { h(w2) = h(w0) and w2 != w0 }
function(x0: T, x1: T) { h(x0) != h(x1) or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: U) { not exists(k1: T) { f(k1) = k0 } }
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { exists(k0: T1) { x0(k0) = x1 } } = is_surjective_fn[T1, T0](x0) }[U, T](f)

goal: exists(k0: U) { k0 = y and has_element_witness(k0) }
proof: function[T0](x0: T0) { has_element_witness[T0](x0) = (x0 = x0) }[U](y)

function(x0: U) { not has_element_witness(x0) }(w0)

let w1: B satisfy { g(w1) = a }
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0, x2: T1) { fiber_predicate[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = (x0(x2) = x1) }[A, B](g, a, w0)
function(x0: B) { not fiber_predicate(g, a, x0) }(w0)
let w0: B satisfy { fiber_predicate(g, a, w0) }

function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0, x2: T1) { fiber_predicate[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = (x0(x2) = x1) }[A, B](g, g(b), b)
not forall(x0: B) { not fiber_predicate(g, g(b), x0) or x0 = b } or not fiber_predicate(g, g(b), b)

function(x0: B) { not fiber_predicate(g, g(b), x0) or b = x0 }(w0)

let w0: B satisfy { g(w0) = g(b) }

is_injective_fn[A, B](h) = forall(x0: A, x1: A) { h(x0) = h(x1) implies x0 = x1 }
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](h)

let w1: A satisfy { h(w1) = h(w0) and w1 != w0 }
let w2: A satisfy { h(w2) = h(w0) and w2 != w0 }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { h(x0) != h(x1) or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)

let w0: B satisfy { forall(x0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, x0) != w0 } }
function(x0: B) { exists(k0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, k0) = x0 } }(w0)
let w1: A satisfy { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, w1) = w0 }
let w2(arg0: B) -> w2_result: A satisfy { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, w2_result) = arg0 }

(forall(x1: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, x1) != w0 } = true)
